title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Craftsvilla

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Craftsvilla
jsonLd.description:
Craftsvilla invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Rajkot location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Craftsvilla:
Craftsvilla is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Craftsvilla!
